revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[日本]]の[[古代]]（[[平安時代]]まで）の[[貴族]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:日本の貴族|こたい]]'
revision.text:
[[日本]]の[[古代]]（[[平安時代]]まで）の[[貴族]]に関するカテゴリ。
[[Category:日本の貴族|こたい]]

[[日本]]の[[古代]]（[[平安時代]]まで）の[[貴族]]に関するカテゴリ。
== 関連カテゴリ == * [[:Category:公家]] - 鎌倉時代以降の[[公家]]に関するカテゴリ。
[[Category:日本の貴族|こたい]]

revision.comment: [[Category:古代日本の人物]]を追加 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
revision.text:
[[日本]]の[[古代]]（[[平安時代]]まで）の[[貴族]]に関するカテゴリ。
== 関連カテゴリ == * [[:Category:公家]] - 鎌倉時代以降の[[公家]]に関するカテゴリ。

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[Japan]]の[[古代]]（[[平安時代]]まで）の[[貴族]]に関するカテゴリ。
== 関連カテゴリ == * [[:Category:公家]] - 鎌倉時代以降の[[公家]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{translated page|ja|Category:日本古代の貴族|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本古代の貴族|version=78567906}} [[Category:Aristocrats of the Nara period]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Japanese nobility]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:People of ancient Japan]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:日本古代の貴族]] [[ko:Category:일본의 고대 귀족]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:奈良時代の貴族]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[Japan]]の[[古代]]（[[平安時代]]まで）の[[貴族]]に関するカテゴリ。
== 関連カテゴリ == * [[:Category:公家]] - 鎌倉時代以降の[[公家]]に関するカテゴリ。
==Local Content== {{translated page|ja|Category:日本古代の貴族|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本古代の貴族|version=78567906}}
[[ja:Category:日本古代の貴族]] [[ko:Category:일본의 고대 귀족]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:奈良時代の貴族]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[Japan]]の[[古代]]（[[平安時代]]まで）の[[貴族]]に関するカテゴリ。
== 関連カテゴリ == * [[:Category:公家]] - 鎌倉時代以降の[[公家]]に関するカテゴリ。
==Local Content== {{translated page|ja|Category:日本古代の貴族|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本古代の貴族|version=78567906}}
[[ja:Category:日本古代の貴族]] [[ko:Category:일본의 고대 귀족]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:奈良時代の貴族]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Aristocrats of the Nara period]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Japanese nobility]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:People of ancient Japan]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q18725797)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q18725797)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{translated page|ja|Category:日本古代の貴族|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本古代の貴族|version=78567906}} {{wikidata link|Q18725797}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:日本古代の貴族]] [[ko:Category:일본의 고대 귀족]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:奈良時代の貴族]] [[Category:Aristocrats of the Nara period]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Japanese nobility]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:People of ancient Japan]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ancient_Japanese_nobility here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
